articles.title: Argentina vs Austria Highlights: Messi Breaks FIFA World Cup Goals Record As Defending Champs Seal Knockout Berth
articles.excerpt: The Argentina captain scored twice, including a stoppage-time clincher, to send the defending champions into the knockout stages and extend his World Cup goals record to 18.
articles.summary: The Argentina captain scored twice, including a stoppage-time clincher, to send the defending champions into the knockout stages and extend his World Cup goals record to 18.

articles.title: Lionel Messi Breaks FIFA World Cup Record For Most Missed Penalties
articles.excerpt: Argentina captain's spot-kick against Austria was his third penalty miss in World Cup matches, the most by any player since records began being tracked in 1966.
articles.summary: Argentina captain's spot-kick against Austria was his third penalty miss in World Cup matches, the most by any player since records began being tracked in 1966.

articles.title: Lionel Messi Recovers From Penalty Miss To Become FIFA World Cup's All
articles.excerpt: Messi's brace against Austria took his World Cup tally to a record 18 goals as Argentina sealed qualification for the knockout stages.
articles.summary: Argentina captain moved past Miroslav Klose to become the outright leading goalscorer in FIFA World Cup history.
